title: The Content Rework Playbook
description: Title slide framing the deck as a practical content-rework guide for product marketers.

title: Why We Rework
description: The case for prioritizing reworks: silent content decay plus the rise of AI search.

title: Your Ranked Worklist
description: Dashboard screenshot framed as a pre-ranked worklist of pages to rework.

title: Freshness & Decay
description: Explains the Freshness Score (time-based bands) and Decay Score (100 - freshness plus penalties) in marketer terms.

title: Priority Score
description: Explains the Priority Score as the master ranking of what to rework first, with max points per factor.

title: The Supporting Signals
description: Explains AI Citation, Keyword Opportunity, Traffic Trend, Triage Status, Content Depth, and Refresh Recommendations.

title: Your Rework Loop
description: The four-step monthly rework loop: Find, Understand, Rework, Track.

title: Start Today
description: Closing call to action: open the dashboard, sort by priority, start reworking.
